title: TV shortlist — ≥50″ · ≤26,000 EGP · no 4K/gimmick priority

householdContext.roomHint: Living 375×450 cm — 50–55″ typical; 65″ if seating distance allows

shoppingRoute: Prefer Samsung / LG / Hisense / Sharp if prices are close — service path
Ignore 4K/QLED/Nano marketing unless two models are equal on size+price+warranty
Confirm built-in receiver if you use satellite; otherwise a cheap external receiver is fine
Budget leftover for wall mount or TV bench — do not blow full 26k on panel only if you need furniture
Re-check B.TECH price the day you buy — TV promos move weekly

kits.name: Value 55″ under 26k
kits.note: Biggest practical size still under ceiling; brand over gimmicks
kits.rule: Pick cheapest 55″ from Samsung/LG/Hisense/Sharp with ≥1y warranty

kits.name: 50″ + cash left
kits.note: Take a solid 50″ ~15–19k and keep money for stand/mount
kits.rule: 50″ LED with built-in receiver; ignore 4K upsell

kits.name: 65″ only if seating distance OK
kits.note: Several 65″ dip under 26k on promo — only if living seating is far enough
kits.rule: Sit ≥2.2–2.5m from screen for 65″ FHD/4K mixed use
